name: Service Level Monitor
description: Translate uptime, latency, error, queue, response, and resolution data into clear SLA or SLO posture, burn rate, breach risk, and action-ready reporting.
not_for: masking poor service with selective reporting windows
incident root-cause deep-dives better handled elsewhere
dashboard updates with no operational action path
typical_inputs: availability, latency, error, queue, or support-response data
measurement clocks, exclusions, and source-of-truth details
recent incidents, trends, and open degradations
customer commitments, penalties, or escalation rules
